notes: v1.14.93 - Redesign frame (header + bottom nav, gated behind body.rd). Makes the whole redesign view match the mock: (1) chrome wordmark image (cc-wordmark.png, decoded losslessly from the handoff asset, precached) replaces the gradient text logo; (2) subtitle COREWEAVE · {site} (cyan, or SET UP SITE in gold when unconfirmed) via cmd_setSiteLabel; (3) top mode-toggle replaced by a fixed bottom nav (Command/Work/Ref), showMode mirrors the active item; (4) search bar hidden, with a header search icon (rd_searchToggle) that reveals it on demand and a clean close that restores the current mode (option A - search stays reachable). redesign_initToggle now adds body.rd and lets CSS gate everything (removed the inline mode-toggle/tab-nav display toggles; this also supersedes the v1.14.92 overlap fix). Frame CSS scoped to ids/descendants (#rd-sub, #rd-botnav, .header-left-text .wmimg) - NOT bare .sub/.wmimg/.botnav - so no collision with app classes. ?redesign=0 never adds .rd: legacy 5-tab field app 100% untouched.
